notes.text: Integration Cards: Object Card now have option for horizontal items layout.
DynamicPage: Preserve focus when moving header
sap.f.CardBase: headingLevel property is now added
sap.f.DynamicPage: Fix title height measurement in _updateTitlePositioning

sap.f.FlexibleColumnLayout: prevent double screen reader announcement on separator
